description: Household energy intelligence — Layer 0 diagnosis, BTM asset signals, tariff slot analysis, shifting opportunities. See docs/APP_PRODUCT_SPEC.md §Home Energy Diagnostic Pathway.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(import_kwh) FROM meter_readings WHERE household_id = '$household_id'::uuid AND $__timeFilter(recorded_at)
SELECT SUM(export_kwh) FROM meter_readings WHERE household_id = '$household_id'::uuid AND $__timeFilter(recorded_at)

SELECT
  ROUND((
    -- Night rate (23:00-08:00): 29.65c × 0.8 discount = 23.72c
    SUM(CASE
      WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') >= 23
        OR EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') < 8
      THEN import_kwh * 0.2372
    END)
    -- Peak rate Mon-Fri 17:00-19:00: 49.28c × 0.8 = 39.42c
    + SUM(CASE
      WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 17 AND 18
        AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 1 AND 5
      THEN import_kwh * 0.3942
    END)
    -- Free Saturday 09:00-17:00: 0c
    + SUM(CASE
      WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 9 AND 16
        AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') = 6
      THEN 0
    END)
    -- Day rate (everything else): 40.34c × 0.8 = 32.27c
    + SUM(CASE
      WHEN NOT (
        EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') >= 23
        OR EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') < 8
      ) AND NOT (
        EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 17 AND 18
        AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 1 AND 5
      ) AND NOT (
        EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 9 AND 16
        AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') = 6
      )
      THEN import_kwh * 0.3227
    END)
  )::NUMERIC, 2) AS est_cost_eur
FROM meter_readings
WHERE household_id = '$household_id'::uuid AND $__timeFilter(recorded_at)

SELECT
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN export_kwh > 0.001 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 1) AS solar_intervals_pct,
  ROUND(MAX(import_kwh) * 2, 2) AS peak_power_kw,
  COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')) AS days_of_data
FROM meter_readings
WHERE household_id = '$household_id'::uuid AND $__timeFilter(recorded_at)

panels.title: Layer 0 — BTM Asset Signals (Solar · Eddi · Usage Behaviour)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroup(recorded_at, '$grain') AS time,
  ROUND(SUM(import_kwh)::NUMERIC, 3) AS "Import kWh",
  ROUND(SUM(export_kwh)::NUMERIC, 3) AS "Export kWh (Solar)"
FROM meter_readings
WHERE household_id = '$household_id'::uuid AND $__timeFilter(recorded_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('month', recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin'), 'Mon YYYY') AS month,
  ROUND(SUM(export_kwh)::NUMERIC, 1) AS export_kwh
FROM meter_readings
WHERE household_id = '$household_id'::uuid
  AND export_kwh > 0.001
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')
ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')

panels.title: Monthly Solar Export — seasonal pattern confirms south-facing roof
Layer 1 — When Do You Use Energy? (Supplier-Agnostic)

panels.description: Average 30-min consumption by hour of day. Peaks reveal Eddi boosts (07:00, 19:45), cooking patterns, showers.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  LPAD(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')::TEXT, 2, '0') || ':00' AS hour_label,
  ROUND(AVG(import_kwh)::NUMERIC, 4)::FLOAT8 AS avg_kwh,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY import_kwh)::NUMERIC, 4)::FLOAT8 AS p90_kwh
FROM meter_readings
WHERE household_id = '$household_id'::uuid AND $__timeFilter(recorded_at)
GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')
ORDER BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')

panels.title: Average Load Profile (hour of day)

panels.description: Average consumption by day of week. Saturday = free window (BGE). Sunday higher = Eddi day rate.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')
    WHEN 0 THEN '0-Sun' WHEN 1 THEN '1-Mon' WHEN 2 THEN '2-Tue'
    WHEN 3 THEN '3-Wed' WHEN 4 THEN '4-Thu' WHEN 5 THEN '5-Fri'
    WHEN 6 THEN '6-Sat'
  END AS day_name,
  ROUND(SUM(import_kwh)::NUMERIC / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')), 0), 2)::FLOAT8 AS avg_daily_kwh,
  ROUND(MAX(import_kwh)::NUMERIC, 4)::FLOAT8 AS peak_30min_kwh
FROM meter_readings
WHERE household_id = '$household_id'::uuid AND $__timeFilter(recorded_at)
GROUP BY EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')
ORDER BY EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')

panels.title: Average Daily Consumption by Day of Week
Layer 2 — Tariff Slot Analysis (BGE Free Time Saturday rates with 20% Affinity)

panels.description: How much of your consumption falls in each tariff slot. Ideal: maximise Night + Free Saturday, minimise Peak.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') >= 23
      OR EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') < 8
    THEN import_kwh ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC, 1) AS "Night (23-08)",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 17 AND 18
      AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 1 AND 5
    THEN import_kwh ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC, 1) AS "Peak (Mon-Fri 17-19)",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 9 AND 16
      AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') = 6
    THEN import_kwh ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC, 1) AS "Free Saturday (09-17)",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN NOT (
      EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') >= 23
      OR EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') < 8
    ) AND NOT (
      EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 17 AND 18
      AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 1 AND 5
    ) AND NOT (
      EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 9 AND 16
      AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') = 6
    )
    THEN import_kwh ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC, 1) AS "Day (other)"
FROM meter_readings
WHERE household_id = '$household_id'::uuid AND $__timeFilter(recorded_at)

panels.title: Consumption by Tariff Slot

panels.description: Monthly cost breakdown by tariff slot. Shows whether plan is being used optimally.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('month', recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin'), 'Mon YY') AS month,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') >= 23 OR EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') < 8 THEN import_kwh * 0.2372 ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC, 2) AS "Night €",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 17 AND 18 AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 1 AND 5 THEN import_kwh * 0.3942 ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC, 2) AS "Peak €",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 9 AND 16 AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') = 6 THEN 0 ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC, 2) AS "Free Sat €",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN NOT (EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') >= 23 OR EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') < 8) AND NOT (EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 17 AND 18 AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 1 AND 5) AND NOT (EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 9 AND 16 AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') = 6) THEN import_kwh * 0.3227 ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC, 2) AS "Day €"
FROM meter_readings
WHERE household_id = '$household_id'::uuid
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')
ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')

panels.title: Monthly Cost by Tariff Slot

panels.description: How much monthly peak-rate consumption could theoretically be shifted to night or free Saturday. This is the addressable saving from behaviour change alone — no hardware needed.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 17 AND 18
      AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 1 AND 5
    THEN import_kwh ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC, 1) AS "Peak kWh (shiftable)",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 17 AND 18
      AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 1 AND 5
    THEN import_kwh * (0.3942 - 0.2372) ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC, 2) AS "Saving if shifted to Night €",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN (
      NOT (EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') >= 23
        OR EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') < 8)
      AND NOT (EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 9 AND 16
        AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') = 6)
    ) THEN import_kwh ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC, 1) AS "Day Rate kWh (review)"
FROM meter_readings
WHERE household_id = '$household_id'::uuid AND $__timeFilter(recorded_at)

panels.title: Shifting Opportunity — Peak → Night

panels.description: Monthly trend: import, export, and net. Falling net = good (more solar self-consumption or reduced usage).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') AS time,
  ROUND(SUM(import_kwh)::NUMERIC, 1) AS "Import",
  ROUND(SUM(export_kwh)::NUMERIC, 1) AS "Export",
  ROUND((SUM(import_kwh) - SUM(export_kwh))::NUMERIC, 1) AS "Net (Import - Export)"
FROM meter_readings
WHERE household_id = '$household_id'::uuid
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')
ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')

panels.title: Monthly Consumption Trend
BTM Load Events — Identify Shiftable Loads (Eddi, Appliances)

panels.description: Count of 30-min intervals with import > 0.3 kWh by hour of day. Peaks at 07:00 and 19:45 are the Eddi hot-water boosts. Other spikes may indicate shiftable appliances.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  LPAD(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')::TEXT, 2, '0') || ':00' AS hour_label,
  COUNT(*)::FLOAT8 AS events,
  ROUND(AVG(import_kwh)::NUMERIC, 4)::FLOAT8 AS avg_event_kwh
FROM meter_readings
WHERE household_id = '$household_id'::uuid
  AND import_kwh > 0.3
  AND $__timeFilter(recorded_at)
GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')
ORDER BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')

panels.title: High-Power Events by Hour (import > 0.3 kWh per 30 min) — labelled by inferred load group

panels.description: Weekday vs weekend average 30-min consumption by hour of day. Saturday Free window (09-17) suppresses weekend peak. Eddi evening boost shows Mon-Fri 19:00-20:00.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  LPAD(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')::TEXT, 2, '0') || ':00' AS hour_label,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') BETWEEN 1 AND 5
                 THEN import_kwh END)::NUMERIC, 4) AS "Weekday (Mon-Fri)",
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') IN (0, 6)
                 THEN import_kwh END)::NUMERIC, 4) AS "Weekend (Sat-Sun)"
FROM meter_readings
WHERE household_id = '$household_id'::uuid AND $__timeFilter(recorded_at)
GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')
ORDER BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin')

panels.title: Weekday vs Weekend Load Profile (avg kWh per 30 min)
Solar Self-Consumption — Opportunity to Reduce Grid Import (18.5c export vs 23.7c night import)

panels.description: Days where solar generated enough to have deferred the 07:00 Eddi grid boost. Each such day saves ~13c (0.55 kWh × 23.72c night rate). Requires Open Meteo integration to act on in real-time — see DAN-107.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily AS (
  SELECT
    DATE(recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') AS d,
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') = 7
              AND import_kwh > 0.3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS boost_fired,
    SUM(export_kwh) AS daily_export
  FROM meter_readings
  WHERE household_id = '$household_id'::uuid AND $__timeFilter(recorded_at)
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE daily_export > 0.5) AS "Solar-Rich Days (export > 0.5 kWh)",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE boost_fired > 0 AND daily_export > 0.5) AS "Overlap: 07:00 boost + solar same day"
FROM daily

panels.title: Morning Boost vs Solar Overlap

panels.description: Estimated annual saving if the 07:00 Eddi grid boost is deferred to solar diversion on overlap days. Saving = 0.55 kWh × 23.72c (night rate avoided). Open Meteo forecast would trigger this recommendation automatically.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily AS (
  SELECT
    DATE(recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') AS d,
    MIN(recorded_at) AS min_ts, MAX(recorded_at) AS max_ts,
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') = 7
              AND import_kwh > 0.3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS boost_fired,
    SUM(export_kwh) AS daily_export
  FROM meter_readings
  WHERE household_id = '$household_id'::uuid AND $__timeFilter(recorded_at)
  GROUP BY 1
),
overlap AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    COUNT(*) * 0.55 * 0.2372 AS total_eur,
    MAX(max_ts) - MIN(min_ts) AS span
  FROM daily WHERE boost_fired > 0 AND daily_export > 0.5
)
SELECT ROUND((total_eur * 365.0 / NULLIF(EXTRACT(DAY FROM span), 0))::NUMERIC, 2) AS "Est. Annual Saving €"
FROM overlap

panels.title: Est. Annual Saving (defer 07:00 boost to solar)

panels.description: Daily solar advisory log. SKIP_BOOST = solar forecast strong enough to defer 07:00 Eddi boost. Sent to Pushover at 06:30. Compare recommendation vs actual next-day export to validate calibration.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  advisory_date::TEXT AS advisory_date,
  recommendation,
  ghi_forecast AS "GHI kWh/m²",
  peak_sun_hours AS "Peak h",
  estimated_solar_kwh AS "Est kWh"
FROM advisory_log
WHERE household_id = '$household_id'::uuid
ORDER BY advisory_date DESC
LIMIT 14

panels.title: Solar Advisory Log (last 14 days) — 06:30 Pushover

panels.description: Monthly breakdown: solar-productive days vs days where 07:00 boost fired AND solar was available. Gap = potential saving. Summer months should show highest overlap.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily AS (
  SELECT
    DATE(recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') AS d,
    DATE_TRUNC('month', recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM recorded_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Dublin') = 7
              AND import_kwh > 0.3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS boost_fired,
    SUM(export_kwh) AS daily_export
  FROM meter_readings
  WHERE household_id = '$household_id'::uuid AND $__timeFilter(recorded_at)
  GROUP BY 1, 2
)
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(month, 'Mon YY') AS month,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE daily_export > 0.5) AS "Solar Days",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE boost_fired > 0 AND daily_export > 0.5) AS "Boost + Solar Overlap"
FROM daily
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY MIN(d)

panels.title: Monthly: Solar Days vs Morning Boost Overlap

list.definition: SELECT id::text || ' (' || COALESCE(tariff_name, city) || ')' FROM households ORDER BY onboarded_at DESC
list.label: Household
list.name: household_id
list.query: SELECT id::text FROM households ORDER BY onboarded_at DESC

title: Household Intelligence
